tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority ("MTA" or "MTA Group") was established under the New York Public Authorities Law and is a public benefit corporation and a component unit of the State of New York

payload.description: Public benefit corporation and component unit of the State of New York, providing transportation services in the New York metropolitan area.

tool_args.label: Deloitte & Touche LLP
tool_args.raw_text: Kostas Makrakis, Lead Client Services Managing Director (Deloitte) presented to the Committee the results of their review of the MTA's Consolidated Financial Statements

payload.description: External auditor for the MTA, engaged to perform audits in accordance with generally accepted auditing standards.

tool_args.label: System-wide paid ridership Q3 2025 vs 2019
tool_args.raw_text: Preliminary MTA system-wide ridership for third quarter 2025 remained below the pre-pandemic level, with paid ridership down 178 million trips (-37.7%) below 2019 fourth quarter ridership.

tool_args.label: System-wide paid ridership Q3 2025 vs Q3 2024 increase
tool_args.raw_text: The third quarter of 2025 exceeded the paid ridership during the third quarter of 2024 by 44 million (10.2%).

tool_args.label: NYCT subway paid ridership increase Q3 2025 vs Q3 2024
tool_args.raw_text: MTA New York City Transit subway paid ridership increased by 28 million trips (9.7%)

payload.scope: MTA New York City Transit subway

tool_args.label: System-wide paid ridership decline Q3 2025 vs 2019
tool_args.raw_text: Preliminary MTA system-wide ridership for third quarter 2025 remained below the pre-pandemic level, with paid ridership down 178 million trips (-37.7%) below 2019 fourth quarter ridership.

tool_args.label: NYCT bus paid ridership increase Q3 2025 vs Q3 2024
tool_args.raw_text: MTA New York City Transit bus paid ridership increased by 10 million trips (12.8%)

payload.scope: MTA New York City Transit bus

tool_args.label: LIRR paid ridership increase Q3 2025 vs Q3 2024
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Long Island Rail Road paid ridership increased by 2 million trips (7.4%)

tool_args.label: MNR paid ridership increase Q3 2025 vs Q3 2024
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Metro-North Railroad paid ridership increased by 1 million trips (11.1%)

tool_args.label: B&T paid vehicle traffic Q3 2025 above 2019 levels
tool_args.raw_text: Paid vehicle traffic at MTA Bridges and Tunnels facilities for the third quarter of 2025 was above 2019 levels by 7 million crossings (7.7%), and B&T traffic in the third quarter, compared with the third quarter of 2024, was up 2 million crossings (1.8%).

tool_args.raw_text: The approved 2025-2029 Capital Programs provided $68,400 in capital expenditures.

tool_args.label: ERM risk assessments conducted in 2025
tool_args.raw_text: In 2025 we conducted 1,499 Risk Assessments

tool_args.label: Control self-assessments completed in 2025
tool_args.raw_text: In 2025, completed 1,534 Control Self Assessments a 9% increase from 2024.

tool_args.label: Superstorm Sandy FTA emergency relief total allocation
tool_args.raw_text: The total allocation of emergency relief funding from the Federal Transit Administration ("FTA") to MTA in connection with Superstorm Sandy to date is $5.90 billion

tool_args.label: MTA employees as of September 30, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: As of September 30, 2025, the MTA employs approximately 76,106 people, more than 90% of whom are represented by labor unions.

tool_args.label: November Plan balanced through 2026 with deficits starting 2027
tool_args.raw_text: The November Plan remains balanced through 2026 with deficits of $160 million in 2027, $243 million in 2028, and $306 million in 2029.

payload.claim_text: The November Plan remains balanced through 2026 with deficits of $160 million in 2027, $243 million in 2028, and $306 million in 2029.
payload.subject: MTA November Financial Plan 2026-2029

tool_args.label: Central Business District Tolling began January 5, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Bridges and Tunnels began collecting CBDTP tolls on January 5, 2025.

payload.claim_text: MTA Bridges and Tunnels began collecting CBDTP tolls on January 5, 2025.
payload.subject: Central Business District Tolling Program

tool_args.label: MTA Bridges and Tunnels toll revenue nine months through September 2025
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Bridges and Tunnels – For the nine months ended September 30, 2025, operating revenue from tolls totaled $2,442.0, which was $517.0, or 26.9%, higher than the nine months of 2024.

tool_args.label: NYCT fare revenue nine months through September 2025
tool_args.raw_text: MTA New York City Transit – For the nine months ended September 30, 2025, revenue from fares was $2,734, an increase of $168, or 6.5%, compared to September 30, 2024.

tool_args.label: MTA Bridges and Tunnels paid traffic Q3 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Paid traffic for the third quarter of 2025 totaled 253.5 million crossings, which was 1.1 million, or 0.4% higher than the third quarter of 2024.

payload.raw_value_text: 253.5 million crossings, 1.1 million (0.4%) higher than Q3 2024
